description: Scalingo is a cloud application platform (PaaS) for deploying and operating applications and managed databases. Its public developer docs cover platform management APIs, database management APIs, and tooling for deploying and managing apps.
summary: Scalingo exposes two documented REST APIs—the main Scalingo API v1 and the Database API v1—plus a documented `scalingo` CLI; both APIs use short-lived Bearer tokens obtained by exchanging a long-lived Scalingo API token.
